---
title: Lit / KI
subtitle: "no"
format: html
# tmeta: $testmeta$
# date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
date: "2026-04-20"
title-meta: ""
bibliography: litKI.bib
cmeta: |
  class: [16431] Literatur und KI ::
  tutor: marlene schwarz ::
  term: SS26
  snc: 16172.2 
#[<< back to online paper <<](https://esteeschwarz.github.io/DC-LX/essais/papers/010/)  
#  arkiv: [<< the anarkkiv lankalevikki worksheet collection >>](https://stschwarz.userpage.fu-berlin.de/links/?title=paperfoot&ref=paper-temp)
arkiv: 16162.tiny
# foot: the anarkkiv lankalevikki worksheet collection >> <https://ada-sub.dh-index.org/blog>
cfoot: |
  [duumy foot collection](https://stschwarz.userpage.fu-berlin.de/links/?title=paperfoot&ref=paper-temp)
---
```{r,echo=F,eval=F}
#print("engine on...")
#val <- quarto::quarto_metadata$get("meta")
#meta <- knitr::metadata
#params <- meta$
#val<-params$tmeta
# t<-"class: [16719] Nietzsche und Nietzscherezeption ::
#   tutor: friederike günther ::
#   term: SS26
#   snc: 16163.1"
# tl<-  unlist(strsplit(t,"::"))
# val.f<-"fixed val"
# val.c<-"{{< meta testmeta >}}"
# val.c<-"{{< meta cmeta >}}"
#val.d<-strsplit(val.c,"::")
#val.d<-unlist(val.d)
#print(typeof(val.c))
#print(val.c)
#print(val.d)
#print(tl)
#print(dim(val.d))
# cat(val.c)
```

{{< meta cmeta >}}

{{< include _gitcom.qmd >}} 

```{r,echo=F,eval=T}
print("engine on...")
#val <- quarto::quarto_metadata$get("meta")
#meta <- knitr::metadata
#params <- meta$
#val<-params$tmeta
val.f<-"fixed val"
val.c<-"{{< meta testmeta >}}"
val.c<-"{{< meta cmeta >}}"
```


# index
1. samling: margin notes general > [link](lki-qa.qmd)
2. [summary on kybernetik introduction](lki-001.qmd)
